# Online Font Notices

Anchor Deck does not bundle these font files. A converted deck requests a font from the pinned jsDelivr URL only after the user selects that font in the editor. Saving HTML preserves the stylesheet link, so reopening that HTML still requires network access.

The initial online font list is:

- Noto Sans SC (思源黑体), `@fontsource/noto-sans-sc@5.2.9`, SIL Open Font License 1.1.
- Noto Serif SC (思源宋体), `@fontsource/noto-serif-sc@5.2.9`, SIL Open Font License 1.1.
- LXGW WenKai (霞鹜文楷), `lxgw-wenkai-webfont@1.7.0`, typeface under SIL Open Font License 1.1; webfont wrapper under MIT.
- ZCOOL XiaoWei (站酷小薇体), `@fontsource/zcool-xiaowei@5.2.8`, SIL Open Font License 1.1.

References:

- Google Fonts FAQ: https://developers.google.com/fonts/faq
- SIL Open Font License 1.1: https://openfontlicense.org/open-font-license-official-text/
- Noto CJK: https://github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk
- LXGW WenKai: https://github.com/lxgw/LxgwWenKai
- ZCOOL XiaoWei in Google Fonts: https://github.com/google/fonts/tree/main/ofl/zcoolxiaowei

Users remain responsible for confirming that any imported font file may be embedded, distributed, or used commercially in their own output.
